hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (Test-Path 'CONSTITUTION.md') { $h = (Get-FileHash 'CONSTITUTION.md' -Algorithm SHA256).Hash.Substring(0,12).ToLower(); Write-Output ('[senate] The Twelve Tables loaded  sha256=' + $h + '  | Curia of 12 jurists ready. Entry: /senate, /legal-opinion, /senate-roster') } else { Write-Output '[senate] WARN: CONSTITUTION.md missing - the Curia will not deliberate without the Twelve Tables.' }"
